lane: Model B - Starmie sequence-gap validation + single-rule probe v1
task: Validate develop-then-attack BEFORE trusting a broad rule (user methodological correction: imitation does not prove same-turn attack; winning-games-only is survivorship-biased).

baseline.note: develop-before-attack already implemented as free-dev-before-KO reorder

eval_sets.ALL_GAMES: 300 top-pilot Starmie games wins+losses (removes survivorship bias)

sequence_audit.survivorship_check: wins-only ~= all-games (96.8 vs 96.5) -> NOT a winning-game artifact

RULE_VERDICT: A. SINGLE_RULE_READY_FOR_LARGER_AB -- the develop-before-attack rule is VALIDATED and ALREADY deployed (free-dev-before-KO). Section-5 safety requirements are met by the audit fixes: game-winning attack checked first; Boss/Wally gated on no-active-KO (do not lose/alter the KO); Ignition only to fund a same-turn Nebula; free dev (bench/evolve/attach/cape/hammer) does not end the turn so the attack remains legal.
one_unmet_section5_item: per-development-action ISOLATED ENGINE re-validation (re-simulate to confirm the same/better attack is still legal) is NOT implemented; instead we reason mechanically + hard-guard the known KO-altering plays (Boss/Wally/Ignition). Optional hardening for a later task.
retreat_audit: spec only -> data/starmie_audit/starmie_retreat_guard_v1_spec.json (RETREAT_GUARD_V1, not implemented per section 6).
hammer_wally_inventory: data/starmie_audit/starmie_hammer_wally_inventory_v1.json (section 8 case inventory; no rule changed). Hammer: 57% on opp active with 1 energy. Wally: 58% on Mega <=165 HP.
learned_c8: NOT integrated; OUT_OF_SUPPORT for Mega Starmie/Staryu/Cinderace/Ignition. Starmie lane stays pure heuristic/search.
stop_conditions_respected: no auto-submit (submission was an explicit user request)
